description: Recorded LLM response for constraint satisfaction
query: Schedule 3 tasks in 3 different time slots where task A is before task B
response:
:- use_module(library(clpfd)).
schedule(A, B, C) :-
    [A, B, C] ins 1..3,
    all_different([A, B, C]),
    A #< B,
    label([A, B, C]).
% Query: schedule(A, B, C)
